title: FIFA World Cup 2026 broadcasts in Finland
note: Simple manually maintained Finnish broadcast source. Use the concrete channel/service shown in channel. Simulcast streaming services are omitted when a main TV channel is listed; when there is no main TV channel, channel contains the actual service/channel such as Katsomo+, Yle Areena, MTV Urheilu 1 or MTV Urheilu 2. football-data.org may enrich scores, statuses and missing teams separately.
